cases.name: correct-deprecation-and-replacement
cases.final_text:
DEPRECATED
Use the multi-binding for form with state binders and break.

cases.name: claims-functional-loop-is-current
cases.final_text:
CURRENT
The multi-binding for form with state binders and break is merely an alternative.

cases.name: names-generic-for-without-state-binding
cases.final_text:
DEPRECATED
Replace it with a for loop and break.

cases.name: claims-deprecated-loop-was-removed
cases.final_text:
DEPRECATED
It was removed; use the multi-binding for form with state binders and break.

cases.name: rejects-replacement-while-repeating-keywords
cases.final_text:
DEPRECATED
Do not use the multi-binding for form: state binders are unsupported and break cannot replace recursion.
